name: 7-minute Frosting
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring water to a simmer in the bottom of a double boiler.
2. In the top of the double boiler, combine room temperature egg whites, sugar, and cold water.
3. Place on the double boiler and mix with an electric mixer for approximately 7 minutes. Do not allow it to cook too much or the icing will be very hard.
4. Add vanilla at the end and stir.
5. Let cool slightly and ice the cakes.
